releases.author: xthecapx
releases.description:
# TheCAP CV Generator v0.1.0

First release of TheCAP CV Generator plugin for Obsidian! This plugin allows you to create and manage your CV/Resume using markdown format directly in your Obsidian vault.

## Features

- Create and edit CVs using a standardized markdown format
- Preview your CV with real-time updates
- Support for structured sections:
  - Contact information
  - Professional experience
  - Education
  - Skills
  - And more!
- Page break control using \break tag

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/xthecapx/thecap-cv-generator/commits/1.0.0
releases.name: Obsidian plugin v1
